headline: US Stocks Record Worst Week Of 2023, Market Volatility Increases
summary:
US stocks closed lower on Friday, with the S&P 500 recording its biggest weekly decline of 2023.

headline: Investor Optimism Declines Following Inflation Report
summary:
The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed some decline in the overall sentiment among US investors.
